title: Marketing Executive | Digital Presence & Content Specialist
description:
• Up to S$3,500 Basic + AWS + Variable Bonus.

  • Woodlands E-Terrace (Woodlands Industrial Park E5).

  • Monday – Friday | 8:30 AM – 6:00 PM.

  • Multi-channel social media management (FB/IG/XHS) and creative content writing.

Join a growing brand as a versatile Marketing Executive. In this role, you will be the creative voice and digital engine of the company. We are looking for a storyteller who can navigate mainstream platforms like Facebook and Instagram while also tapping into the high-growth Xiaohongshu market. You will manage everything from high-level digital campaigns to the essential details of product price lists and brochures, ensuring our brand remains competitive and engaging.

Responsibilities:

  • Social Media Management: Manage and grow the company’s presence across Facebook, Instagram, and Xiaohongshu.

  • Content Creation: Lead creative content writing for newsletters, promotional materials, and digital campaigns to drive brand awareness.

  • Digital Campaigns: Develop and execute interactive campaigns to increase follower engagement and interaction.

  • Sales Enablement: Update product price lists, brochures, and "new arrival" notices across all customer communication channels.

  • Market Intelligence: Conduct research on industry trends and competitor activities to develop fresh marketing ideas.

  • Admin & Sales Support: Assist with office administrative tasks and provide ad-hoc sales support to ensure overall company profitability.

  • Media Coordination: Plan advertising schedules and coordinate media placements to maximize reach.

Requirements:

  • Diploma in Digital Marketing, E-Marketing, Business Administration, or equivalent.

  • 2–3 years of working experience in Marketing Support or a related field.

  • Proficient in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).

    • Strong knowledge of Photo and Video editing (preferred).

    • Native-level familiarity with Social Media channels (especially XHS).

  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills with a proven track record in content writing.

  • Independent, detail-oriented, and self-motivated.

  • Candidates who can start immediately or within a short notice period will be prioritized.

Others Information:

  • Stable Rewards: Competitive basic salary paired with guaranteed AWS and performance-based bonuses.

Please indicate the following information in your resume:

  • Current & Expected salary.

  • Portfolio link or samples of previous content writing/social media work.

  • Availability to commence work.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified. All applications will be treated with the strictest confidence.

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Now Singapore Pte Ltd | EA No: 21C0845


We provide solutions to all recruitment needs as well as HR services for a range of industries in Singapore. Our clients varying from well-known and established corporations to up-and-coming start-ups, put their trust in our services to provide the most efficient and effective results for recruitment and HR services. Supporting the exponential growth of our clients is and always will be what we strive for. 


We have a team of well-equipped recruiters who are dedicated to placing job seekers with the best-suited companies. We make sure our recruiters at Recruit Now are well-educated on employment laws, job market and skillsets needed for respective industries to ensure a meticulous selection process in recruitment and safe employment. 


Take your first step in finding your career.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT NOW SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
